name: Cleartext Storage of Sensitive Information in Executable
description: The product stores sensitive information in cleartext within an executable file. Attackers can reverse engineer the binary to extract secret data such as cryptographic keys, passwords, or API tokens.
detection_pattern: Look for STORAGE nodes (compiled binary, executable resource section) receiving sensitive data from INGRESS or META nodes (hardcoded secrets, embedded credentials) without a TRANSFORM mediator (encryption, key vault retrieval, obfuscation) that protects the sensitive data from static analysis of the executable.
